framework.name: Tokenization/Virtual Cards for PCI-DSS Avoidance
framework.description: Using tokenization or virtual cards via APIs so autonomous agents never handle raw sensitive payment data (PAN numbers, CVV). This offloads PCI-DSS compliance requirements to the payment provider rather than requiring the agent's environment to be secure and audited like a payment processor. Enables agent payments without bringing the entire AI system into PCI compliance scope.
framework.raw_quote: One workaround is to use tokenization or virtual cards via APIs so the agent never 'sees' raw sensitive data (thus offloading PCI compliance to the provider).

source.title: Enabling Autonomous AI Agents to Make Payments - LinkedIn
